# 1Way Home Services

> 1Way Home Services is a tax preparation and real estate advisory firm based in El Cajon, California, serving individuals, families, small businesses, and real estate investors across San Diego County. The team combines tax expertise with real estate and mortgage consulting under one roof, so clients get coordinated advice on filings, IRS matters, property transactions, and financing decisions.

Now in its sixth year, the firm is led by CFO Sam Eram (tax preparation and financial services) and CEO Bakhan Kareem (real estate and mortgage consulting). The practice offers seven core services, flat and upfront pricing on tax filing, and year-round IRS notice support at no additional cost. Initial consultations are free and available in person, by phone, or via Zoom. The fastest way to reach the firm is by phone at (619) 716-9193.

## Services

- [Tax Planning & Advisory](https://1wayhomeservices.vercel.app/en/services/tax-planning/): Strategic tax planning to minimize liability and maximize deductions for individuals and businesses year-round. Free initial consultation.
- [Tax Filing](https://1wayhomeservices.vercel.app/en/services/tax-filing/): Complete federal and state tax return preparation for individuals and businesses, with e-file and direct deposit. Starting at $199.
- [Personal Tax Filing (Individuals & Families)](https://1wayhomeservices.vercel.app/en/personal-tax-filing/): Dedicated landing page for individual and family returns with flat-rate pricing, IRS audit protection, and a full FAQ.
- [Payroll Tax Filing](https://1wayhomeservices.vercel.app/en/services/payroll-tax/): Quarterly and annual payroll tax filings, W-2 and 1099 preparation, and compliance management for businesses. From $150/month.
- [Bookkeeping](https://1wayhomeservices.vercel.app/en/services/bookkeeping/): Monthly financial record keeping, bank reconciliation, and financial statement preparation. From $200/month.
- [IRS Help & Audit Support](https://1wayhomeservices.vercel.app/en/services/irs-help/): Professional representation during IRS audits, notices, and collections, including penalty abatement and payment plan negotiation. Free consultation for audit cases.
- [Real Estate Tax Support](https://1wayhomeservices.vercel.app/en/services/real-estate-tax/): Capital gains planning, 1031 exchanges, depreciation strategies, and property sale tax planning for investors. Free initial consultation.
- [Mortgage Consulting](https://1wayhomeservices.vercel.app/en/services/mortgage-consulting/): Loan pre-approval, refinancing analysis, debt planning, and home buying guidance. Initial consultation at no charge.

## Team

- **Sam Eram** — Chief Financial Officer · Tax Preparation & Financial Services
- **Bakhan Kareem** — Chief Executive Officer · Real Estate & Mortgage Consulting

## Contact

- **Phone:** (619) 716-9193 — best for fastest response
- **Email:** info@1wayhomeservices.com
- **Service area:** El Cajon, San Diego, and surrounding San Diego County cities (La Mesa, Santee, and nearby areas)
- **Hours:** By appointment; free initial consultations available in person, by phone, or via Zoom
